children.heading: Startup funds
children.label: a Startup funds
children.text: For purposes of assisting the Foundation in establishing an office and meeting initial administrative, project, and other startup expenses, the Secretary is authorized to provide to the Foundation $500,000, from funds appropriated pursuant to , per year for the two years beginning . Such funds shall remain available to the Foundation until they are expended for authorized purposes.section 583j–8(a) of this titleOctober 1, 1992

children.heading: Matching funds
children.label: b Matching funds
children.text: In addition to the startup funds provided under subsection (a) of this section, during fiscal years 2016 through 2023, the Secretary is authorized to provide matching funds for administrative and project expenses incurred by the Foundation as authorized by including reimbursement of expenses under , not to exceed then current Federal Government per diem rates.section 583j–8(b) of this titlesection 583j–1 of this title

children.heading: Administrative expenses
children.label: c Administrative expenses
children.text: At any time, the Secretary may provide the Foundation use of Department of Agriculture personnel, facilities, and equipment, with partial or no reimbursement, with such limitations and on such terms and conditions as the Secretary shall establish.
